verdict.claim: Dataset-free HS-JEPA action-health failures can calibrate the real sleep-adapter row-target release boundary.
verdict.failure_interpretation: If relaxed pressure beats guarded release on public LB, action-health is still a useful module but the adapter needs a less conservative action decoder.

config.name: benchmark_guarded_full_plus
config.risk_role: LB candidate: full-core reference plus benchmark-safe high-pressure boundary cells

config.name: route_pressure_boundary_probe
config.risk_role: Big-bet sensor: tests whether high-responsibility route-only cells are over-vetoed by action-health

config.name: health_relaxed_pressure_sensor
config.risk_role: Architecture sensor: tests whether action-health is too conservative despite benchmark FP risk
